testcase.name: test_06_approval_does_not_trigger_rejection_email
testcase.failure: tests/test_transfer_rejection_email.py:224: in test_06_approval_does_not_trigger_rejection_email assert response.status_code == 200, f"Approval failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Approval failed: {"detail":"Transfer not found"} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_07_admin_transfers_queue_shows_rejected_correctly

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should contain 'transfers' key assert 'transfers' in {'data': [{'admin_action_at': '2026-02-20T14:36:53.067000+00:00', 'admin_action_by': 'admin_super_001', 'amount': 750, 'attachment_url': None, ...}, {'admin_action_at': '2026-02-20T14:34:08.016000+00:00', 'admin_action_by': 'admin_super_001', 'amount': 500, 'attachment_url': None, ...}, {'admin_action_at': '2026-02-20T13:37:21.707000+00:00', 'admin_action_by': 'admin_super_001', 'amount': 11340000, 'attachment_url': None, ...}, {'admin_action_at': '2026-02-20T10:52:51.876000+00:00', 'admin_action_by': 'admin_super_001', 'amount': 4810300, 'attachment_url': None, ...}, {'admin_action_at': '2026-02-19T08:13:35.127000+00:00', 'admin_action_by': 'admin_super_001', 'amount': 1000000, 'attachment_url': None, ...}, {'admin_action_at': '2026-02-19T08:05:36.767000+00:00', 'admin_action_by': 'admin_super_001', 'amount': 400000, 'attachment_url': None, ...}, ...], 'ok': True, 'pagination': {'has_next': True, 'has_prev': False, 'limit': 50, 'page': 1, ...}}

testcase.name: test_mask_iban_function_logic
testcase.failure: tests/test_transfer_rejection_email.py:530: in test_mask_iban_function_logic assert result == expected, f"mask_iban({iban}) = {result}, expected {expected}" E AssertionError: mask_iban(DE89370400440532013000) = DE89**************3000, expected DE89************3000 E assert 'DE89**************3000' == 'DE89************3000' E E - DE89************3000 E + DE89**************3000 E ? ++
